response_constraints: Base every availability statement on the corresponding tool result.
Include a result for each of the four requested options and do not introduce alternatives.
Report available entries first in alphabetical order, then every remaining entry alphabetically; do not omit a check.

stages.purpose: Issue all four fully specified, mutually independent availability calls in one assistant action.

state_assertions: All four availability calls occur in one parallel stage.
The initial records remain unchanged; no record is created and no notification is sent.

prompt: For 2026-08-26, check these four support review slot options: Locked account review (Acme); Incorrect invoice review (Beacon); Failed activation review (Cedar); Refund delay review (Delta). Run the four availability checks independently in one batch. This is a read-only comparison: do not create a record or send a notification. Report available entries first in alphabetical order, then every remaining entry alphabetically; do not omit a check.
